name: OpenCVE
description: OpenCVE — CVE monitoring & alerting platform (self-hosted or app.opencve.io). Pulls CVEs from the OpenCVE REST API (filtered by vendor / product / keyword / CVSS severity / tag) and imports them as vulnerabilities (XVULNERABILITY). Tool: https://www.opencve.io. Auth from the worker environment: OPENCVE_API_TOKEN (Bearer org token) OR OPENCVE_USERNAME + OPENCVE_PASSWORD (Basic, legacy v1); base URL via OPENCVE_URL or the 'base' parameter.

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: OpenCVE base URL (e.g. https://app.opencve.io or your self-hosted instance). Overrides OPENCVE_URL. Default: https://app.opencve.io.

parameters.name: vendor
parameters.help: Filter CVEs by vendor name (OpenCVE slug, e.g. 'microsoft').

parameters.name: product
parameters.help: Filter CVEs by product name (used with vendor).

parameters.name: search
parameters.help: Keyword filter on CVE id or description.

parameters.name: cvss
parameters.help: Filter by CVSS 3.1 severity. When set, it also sets each imported finding's severity.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.help: Filter by an OpenCVE user tag.

parameters.name: details
parameters.help: Fetch each CVE's detail to populate the exact CVSS score & CWE (one extra request per CVE — slower; bounded by max_items).

parameters.name: project
parameters.help: Optional asset name to attach the CVEs to (creates ASSETVULNERABILITY links). Omit to only enrich the CVE database.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved OpenCVE JSON response to parse instead of calling the API ({results:[...]}, a bare list, or a single CVE).
